-ˏˋ⋆ april flowers event day 7, part 1 || **Naga**/Medusa || **any!pov** || [part 2 here](https://janitorai.com/characters/9fd14af1-6fdf-4e8d-a660-53207ff50e37_character-euryale-drakos) ⋆ˊˎ- 🐍 Thinking it just a rumor, you traveled deep below Athens to find a cave rumored to be filled with gold and riches.
